objective: Add an opt-in Dream long-haul mode that only extends runtime when yield metrics and deeper probes improve morning packets over the short path.
validation_commands: cd cli && env -u AGENTOPS_RPI_RUNTIME go test ./cmd/ao ./internal/overnight -timeout 3m

tracker_health.reason: bd probes succeeded and discovery created epic na-22xi with four child issues.

done_criteria: Default Dream behavior remains the current short path unless long-haul is explicitly enabled.
Dream summary artifacts explain long-haul trigger reason, probe results, and early-exit reason.
Long-haul mode uses measurable yield gates instead of raw wall-clock as success criteria.
At least one bounded read-only probe lane improves morning-packet evidence over the short path.
Council participation is readiness-checked, bounded, and does not silently dominate long-haul cost.
CLI docs, Dream skill docs, and Codex Dream artifacts stay in sync with the shipped behavior.

test_levels.rationale: The work spans contracts, command orchestration, and overnight replay behavior. Unit and command tests are required, and at least one end-to-end Dream replay must prove the long-haul decision path.
